title: Implement package installation, verification, and component registry
summary: Install signed packages transactionally, verify provenance/API/capabilities/resources, register components/integrations, and support rollback/uninstall.

title: Implement transactional system update pipeline
summary: Assemble, stage, verify, activate, monitor, roll back, and report kernel/platform/product updates across supported targets.

title: Implement recovery environment and service tools
summary: Provide independent verified diagnostics, storage inspection, update repair, backup restore, key/revocation flow and target reflash without normal system services.

title: Build unified observability and evidence export pipeline
summary: Join logs, traces, metrics, power, frame, storage, network, crash and experiment metadata into reproducible bounded evidence bundles.

title: Implement emulator hardware-service backends and fault injection
summary: Provide deterministic display/input/storage/network/audio/camera/cellular/power fakes that exercise portable services before hardware availability.

title: Build cross-target platform conformance suite
summary: Prove that QEMU and native targets implement the same capability, lifecycle, error, update, recovery, power and service semantics.

title: Implement hardware trace capture and deterministic replay
summary: Record public-safe service-level traces from stock/reference/native systems and replay them against Agent OS backends without importing their OS ABI.

title: Publish developer SDK, debugger, and service test kit
summary: Let contributors build native components, generate bindings, run emulator tests, inspect capabilities/traces, package, and validate without full source tree expertise.

title: Generate backend conformance tests from Agent OS IDL
summary: Generate backend conformance tests from Agent OS IDL

title: Product Runtime epic
summary: Build entities, actions, history, agents, shell, accessibility, backup, and stock experiences.

title: Implement entity graph store and query service
summary: Persist, index, query, authorize, migrate, snapshot, and export entity/relationship data through scoped projections.

title: Implement integration and provider registry
summary: Register signed entity/action/view/widget providers, their compatibility, capabilities, endpoints, data policies, quality evidence, revocation and lifecycle.

title: Implement action executor, receipts, and compensation
summary: Execute approved actions through providers with policy checks, idempotency, progress, cancellation, result validation, receipts and inverse/compensating actions.

title: Implement provider selection and routing policy
summary: Select providers by user defaults, context, privacy, cost, locality, quality, trust, availability and capability fit while exposing sensitive choices.

title: Implement append-only semantic event log
summary: Persist versioned semantic events with causal links, provenance, sensitivity, retention, integrity, payload encryption and bounded indexing.

title: Implement materialized views, snapshots, and deterministic replay
summary: Derive current entity/activity state from trusted events and snapshots without repeating external effects.

title: Implement encrypted peer/cloud sync v0
summary: Synchronize eligible events/objects across devices or user-controlled relays with identity, causal progress, conflicts, revocation, quotas and offline recovery.

title: Prove semantic journal excludes secure/raw sensitive input
summary: Verify that passwords, one-time codes, biometric material, private-key operations, protected views and diagnostic raw input do not enter durable/synced history by default.

title: Implement history timeline, search, export, deletion, and explanations
summary: Let users inspect events by entity/activity/provider/capability/device/time, understand provenance, and apply honest retention/deletion/export actions.

title: Implement entity-first shell skeleton
summary: Render entity identity/state/activity/actions/views and workspace navigation through portable scene, input, accessibility, storage, and provider contracts.

title: Implement IntentBox draft and confirmation flow
summary: Parse multimodal user input into editable intent drafts with entities, constraints, providers, grants, estimates, ambiguity and effect preview.

title: Implement widget and view sandbox contracts
summary: Render declarative or sandboxed provider views with scoped entity projections, action handles, accessibility, energy/network budgets and failure fallback.

title: Implement notification, structured clipboard, and share services
summary: Provide typed, provenance-aware, permissioned notifications, clipboard history, selections and share actions across providers.

title: Run full device migration and restore drill
summary: Restore portable state, rehydrate accounts, regenerate device-bound identity, report omissions, and revoke/retain old-device trust deliberately.

title: Implement encrypted backup bundle and verified restore
summary: Create chunked self-describing encrypted backups with integrity, compatibility, omission, key-wrapping, destination and restore verification.

title: Implement accessibility semantics and assistive-service baseline
summary: Make core shell, settings, history, actions, recovery and stock workflows operable through semantic trees, keyboard, switch, screen reader and magnification.

title: Implement localization and multimodal input framework
summary: Support Unicode, bidi, locale-aware presentation, pseudolocalization, keyboards, voice/handwriting adapters and retention of originals by policy.

title: Benchmark entity-first shell against task baselines
summary: Measure workflow time, errors, comprehension, resumption, trust and discoverability for entity-first versus conventional app/launcher approaches.

title: Evaluate IntentBox interpretation and confirmation safety
summary: Measure whether users detect and correct ambiguous entities, accounts, recipients, amounts, providers, destinations and irreversible effects.

title: Implement and evaluate agent shadow mode
summary: Let agents propose ranked action plans and explanations without execution, then measure usefulness, errors, unsupported assumptions and user corrections.

title: Implement agent budgets, approval, receipts, and bounded autonomy
summary: Enforce per-agent data, network, cost, energy, rate, time, scope and effect policies for reversible/confirmed execution.

title: Deliver Tier 0/1 stock experience alpha
summary: Integrate settings, system status, files/editor, contacts, calendar, tasks, notes, photos, browser/provider, search, backup and developer tools into coherent portable experiences.

title: Prototype IntentBox and FlexLight with inspectable action plans
summary: Prototype IntentBox and FlexLight with inspectable action plans

title: Implement semantic transclusion and SideMemo prototype
summary: Implement semantic transclusion and SideMemo prototype
